name: Vendor Risk Analyzer — Internal Only (On-Prem)
description: Internal-only sibling of sys-vendor-risk-ext-001 for vendor risk assessments that require referencing OUR confidential context (internal system inventory, customer data classifications, MNPI deal pipeline). Uses local deterministic answer assembly (BM25 retrieval + template composition) instead of an external LLM, so the prompt never leaves the network. The agent code is identical to the external sibling; only the LLM step differs. Network egress is asserted-off via a context manager during the LLM step; any outbound socket open raises and short-circuits the chain. Routing into this system happens automatically when the policy_gate detects sensitive token types from scrub_pii output (INTERNAL_SYSTEMS, MNPI, or operator queries containing PII/NPI references to internal systems).
use_case: Process vendor risk assessments where the analysis must reference our own confidential internal context (system inventory, customer data classes, MNPI deal scope) under the same governance chain as the external system, with on-prem inference instead of cloud LLM.
